  "findings": [
    "The combined weight of the load and rigging exceeds the crane's rated capacity at the specified operating radius according to the manufacturer's load chart."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately halt all lifting operations.",
    "Lower the load safely if suspended, or keep it grounded.",
    "Re-evaluate the rigging configuration, load weight, and crane positioning/radius before attempting any further lifts."
  ],
  "rationale": "The field condition indicates that the combined weight of the load and rigging exceeds the allowable capacity specified in the crane's load chart for the given operating radius. Operating a crane beyond its rated capacity violates OSHA 1926.1400 standards and poses an immediate, critical risk of structural failure or tip-over.",

    "Manufacturer Load Charts"
  ]
